clarity.notes: All 8 sections clearly labeled with eyebrows, headlines under 14 words, lead text under 56ch. Product purpose is immediately clear.

hierarchy.notes: Hero has one dominant focal point (display headline). Feature grid is clean. Phone mockups create visual rhythm. Minor: feature cards could benefit from slightly more vertical breathing room.

typography.notes: JetBrains Mono for all display/headings, Inter for body. UPPERCASE labels with 0.12em letter-spacing. Tabular numerics on stats. Fully consistent with Phantom Works spec.

motion.notes: Static mockup — no animations. The brief asked for visual-only, no interactions. Acceptable for the deliverable type.

brand.notes: Faithfully implements Phantom Works: dark-first #0A0A0A, red-only accent #D40000, paper cutout red shadows, sharp 2-4px radius, no gradients, no emoji icons. All tokens from DESIGN.md.
